key_rules.title: Mandatory RERA Project Registration
key_rules.description: All projects >500 sqm or >8 apartments must be registered with state RERA. Non-registration illegal.

key_rules.title: 70% Escrow Account Rule
key_rules.description: 70% of buyer funds must go to separate escrow account. Quarterly progress updates mandatory.

key_rules.title: RERA 2.0 Updates (2026)
key_rules.description: Stricter penalties for delays, mandatory audits, faster dispute resolution, standardized agreements.
